types: Voice recordings and transcripts (all voice commands and queries)
Location data (from device, GPS, or IP address)
Device information (device type, ID, settings, firmware version)
Smart home device data (connected devices, automation routines, status)
Usage patterns (when device activated, what commands used, frequency)
Contacts and calendar data (if permission granted)
Environmental data (temperature, humidity, light levels from sensors)
Always-on microphone data (detecting wake word continuously)
sensitive_types: Smart home sensor data (intimate household activities)
Behavioral patterns (when at home, sleep patterns, etc.)
data_collected.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

purposes: Process and respond to voice commands
Improve speech recognition and Alexa capabilities
Enable smart home automation and integration
Advertising (targeted based on interests and behaviors)
purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Amazon shares voice data with third-party skill developers and partners

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Alexa usage patterns shared with Amazon advertising; used for targeted ads across ecosystem

cross_site_tracking.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Alexa data linked across Amazon services; cross-device tracking in Amazon ecosystem

used_for_profiling.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Creates detailed profiles based on voice commands, habits, preferences, location

used_to_train_ai.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Voice data used to train speech recognition, NLP models, and improve Alexa AI

categories: Amazon subsidiaries (AWS, Amazon Advertising, Amazon Music, etc.)
Smart home device manufacturers (Ring, Philips Hue, etc.)
Law enforcement (upon legal request or emergency)
third_party_recipients.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

retention_period.value: Voice recordings retained indefinitely unless user deletes (can delete automatically or manually); transcripts retained for account duration; smart home data retained for account duration
retention_period.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

delete_your_data.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Users can delete voice recordings individually or automatically by voice or app

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Users can edit account and smart home information

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Users can disable voice purchasing and adjust privacy settings; limited ability to prevent all sharing

data_portability.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

appeal_decisions.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — HTTPS/TLS encryption for data transmission

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Voice recordings and data encrypted on AWS servers

mfa_available.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Amazon account supports two-factor authentication

breach_notification.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Amazon complies with breach notification laws

independent_audits.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — AWS undergoes SOC 2 compliance audits

honors_gpc.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Amazon does not honor Global Privacy Control signals

honors_dnt.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Amazon does not honor Do Not Track signals

childrens_privacy.notes: Amazon Alexa requires parent account for setup. Amazon Household feature allows parental controls for child access. Amazon Kids+ provides restricted access for younger children. COPPA compliance applies to child accounts.
childrens_privacy.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

gaps: Data portability mechanisms not clearly specified
GPC signal honoring explicitly denied but reasoning unclear
Scope of voice data sharing with third-party developers not fully transparent
Human review of voice recordings not clearly addressed
Voice biometric retention and use policies unclear
label_notes: Source: training knowledge — accessed 2026-03-20. CRITICAL PRIVACY CONCERNS FOR ALEXA: Always-on microphone continuously listening for wake word. Voice recordings retained indefinitely by default (requires active management by user). Voice data shared with Amazon ecosystem, advertisers, and third-party skill developers. Behavioral profiling from voice patterns and smart home activity. Multiple CCPA-sensitive data types: geolocation, voice biometrics, behavioral patterns, household activity inference. Amazon humans review voice recordings for quality improvement (can be disabled). Cross-device tracking across all Amazon devices and services. Significant privacy-intrusive design compared to other smart home platforms.
